content: Remote OK Caretaker Manor Park Primary School Isle of Man Public Service Careers <strong>About The Role<br><br></strong>Do you take pride in creating a safe, clean and welcoming environment where children can thrive?<br><br>Join the friendly team at Manor Park Primary School as our Caretaker. You'll play a key role in maintaining high standards of cleanliness and hygiene, monitoring health and safety, overseeing site security and supervising cleaning staff. This is a varied, hands on role where you'll use your initiative, organise workloads and help keep the school running smoothly.<br><br>As a visible and valued member of the school community, you'll build positive relationships with staff, students and visitors while working closely with colleagues across the Department of Education, Sport and Culture. Use your organisation, communication and problem solving skills in a role that offers variety, responsibility and the opportunity to take ownership of a safe and welcoming environment for everyone who uses the school. Apply today!<br><br><strong>A workplace that invests in you<br><br></strong>A competitive salary that increases each 12 months until you reach the salary maximum.<br><br>Annual leave starting from 21 days, a Privilege Day and 10 Bank Holidays; your annual leave will increase after your first year and again after your third year.<br><br>Subject to meeting eligibility criteria, the IOM Public Service offers two pension arrangements: the Isle of Man Government Unified Scheme 2011 or the Isle of Man Government Defined Contribution (DC) Arrangement.<br><br>Access to the Learning, Education and Development training facility, which is exclusively for Public Service employees, to keep on top of your continuous professional development.<br><br>Discounted access to the NSC gym and island swimming pools as well as 1-to-1 support programmes and exercise classes with qualified instructors.<br><br>Free access to the Isle of Man Government Staff Welfare Service which offers professional counselling, emotional support and signposting on a wide range of issues.<br><br>Ability to apply for an unpaid career break after 3 yearsâ service.<br><br>Access to the Isle of Man Public Service Cycle to Work scheme after your first year of employment.<br><br>Free car parking.<br><br><strong>Working for the Isle of Man Public Service<br><br></strong>We are the largest employer on the island delivering a diverse range of services to the people of the Isle of Man. We care, nurture and value our employeesâ wellbeing, development and career and place great importance on rewarding the commitment by our wonderful employees.<br><br>We support and promote flexible working, recognising the importance of working flexibly around your life and commitments and the benefits in improving work-life balance. We are happy to discuss flexible working arrangements where possible and if interested you should discuss this with the Recruiting Manager.<br><br>The Isle of Man Public Service is committed to creating an inclusive culture that celebrates . We understand how a wide range of views and experiences can benefit us as we work together for the Isle of Man.<br><br>Your candidate experience is important to us. As a proud member of The Circle Back Initiative, we commit to respond to every applicant that applies for an Isle of Man Public Service role.<br><br>We are committed to and as an entire nation , we are transforming public services for a sustainable future and your contributions will directly benefit our community, economy, and environment.<br><br><strong>Things to note<br><br></strong>An enhanced with barring police check is required for this post, the cost of which will be covered by the Isle of Man Government.<br><br>Please note a relocation package is not available for this role.<br><br><strong>Ready to apply?<br><br></strong>We understand that you might have some questions about the role and the Recruiting Manager is on hand to support you. You can contact them at Ayesha.Erani-Kirkham@sch.im.<br><br>To get the best out of your application, read our on the important essentials you need to know before applying.<br><br>Applications will be accepted up to midnight of the closing date specified. The ideal person will be (a) process and systems orientated (b) enthusiastic for technology and AI powered tools (c) operating across legal, compliance, corporate admin, HR, and technology. (d) A discreet, professional and trustworthy person is required due to sensitive personal and corporate information.</p><p><br></p><p>Aventum Search is acting as an exclusive search partner for this opening. Expertise gained within private markets is preferred and prioritized in the review process. This role is responsible for building and maintaining a consistent employee experience, ensuring strong compliance foundations, administering benefits, and implementing scalable performance and engagement systems as the company grows.</p><p><br></p><p>Ideal candidate will have 8 plus years of experience partnering with leadership and serving as the primary point of contact for all HR operations, including rolling out OKRs (Rippling a huge plus)</p><p><br></p><p>Huge plus if you have been involved in high-growth startup environments and have a proven history of building successful HR policies and practices.</p><p><br></p><p>We are looking for an inspirational HR lead to head all HR day-to-day practices and champion a strong culture of caring and embracing employee engagement.</p><p><br></p><p>This is an excellent opportunity to join a stable, yet growing organization that treats its employees very well.</p> copywriting, customer support, exec Colorado, Colorado, United States 2026-06-30T02:03:38+00:00 1134242 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-hr-lead-wowza-1134242 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png
